import React from 'react'; import SpecialistAreas from '../components/SpecialistAreas'; const StainlessSteel = () => { const products = [ 'Handrails', 'Balustrades', 'Cladding', 'Panels', 'Spacer Fittings', 'Foot Rails', 'Handles', 'Cabinets', 'Tables', 'Inserts', 'Inlays', 'Tanks', 'Pipings', 'Lift Entrance Jambs with Transom', 'All kind of Decorative products', 'Architectural SS works for Joinery & Interior decoration' ]; const projects = [ 'Projects Handled / Services Offered in Interiors (Stainless Steel)' ]; return (
Stainless Steel Works and Fabrications

Handrails, Balustrades, Cladding, Panels, Spacer Fittings, Foot Rails, Handles, Cabinets, Tables, inserts, inlays, Tanks, Pipings, Lift Entrance Jambs with Transom and all kind of Decorative products & Architectural SS works for Joinery & Interior decoration.


{projects[0]}

); }; export default StainlessSteel;
